recentTweets.text: I can’t believe our finale for #TheBadBatch just aired, and now ALL 6 shorts for #TalesOfTheEmpire are going to air tomorrow!  It’s like a Lucasfilm Animation Christmas.  Happy #MayThe4th A lot of hard work and love for #StarWars went into them.  Enjoy!

All I can say is Wow!  Truly at a loss for words…. All the love that we are getting back from fans as our BB show comes to an end is amazing.  Thank you so much to each and everyone of you who watch and love the show.  #TheBadBatch #StarWars

Will these be needed after tomorrow?  Guess we will find out…. Hope you all enjoy the final episode of #TheBadBatch #StarWars Thanks so much from all of us for watching Clone Force 99’s journey! https://t.co/v20SAgclnw
Some of my personal favorite voiceover work of the entire show!  @NoshirDalal had us all laughing when we got to hear what we had to work with for animation.  So much fun!  #StarWars #TheBadBatch

Can’t wait for you all to see this season of #TalesOfTheEmpire !  The opportunity to get to have Grievous in action again was awesome!  A few shots in this clip animated by our own locally based outstanding animator @Greg_Verreault . #StarWars
Can’t believe it is here already.  The penultimate episode of #TheBadBatch .  Hope you all enjoy!  #starwars

Animating the different personalities of these kids was a challenge and a lot of fun.  Getting close to the end…. What will happen to them all?   Not too much longer before you all find out!  #StarWars #TheBadBatch

Glad it seems like the fans enjoyed Rampart being tossed around like a dead fish.  Honestly, we were not sure how far to go with it,  but we leaned into Weekend at Bernie’s vibes and just went for it.  A fun bit of comedy.  #starwars #TheBadBatch
Definitely some fun crazy vehicle action in this week’s episode!  Also some high stakes for our crew.  #StarWars #TheBadBatch
So in case you have not heard.  We decided to do some more shorts with a few familiar characters…. Check it out!! #StarWars

When you watch this weeks #TheBadBatch episode please spare some thoughts for our partners CGCG in Taiwan after the earthquake.  We are assured they are all well.  Without the team there we would not be able to bring these amazing stories to you.  thank you.  #StarWars

That is awesome to hear!  Our amazing episodic director Steward Lee set us up for success with some outstanding fight choreography!  When it comes to hand to hand or any kind of martial arts he is our secret weapon. From that point the animation team puts on the finishing touches
Hope you all enjoy this episode as much we did while we were making it!  #thebadbatch #StarWars
This week is the first of the final 8 episodes of #TheBadBatch Hope everyone is ready for this ride that we have coming up!  #StarWars

That last Bad Batch was a fun episode.  We had not really done a swamp episode.  @joelaron and our FX team did amazing work in that one with the water.  The crazy Sylar Seris was a blast to animate!  Hope you all enjoyed!  #TheBadBatchS3 #StarWars

Hope you all enjoy the double dip of the #TheBadBatch this week.  Last weekend was one of my favorite animated scenes between Crosshair and Hunter in the snow.  Wonder what the crew is up to this week?  About time to find out!  #StarWars
So it’s true!  We are hiring for two mid level animator positions to join our incredible team at LAL.    Now is the time if you are interested!  #lucasfilm #StarWars
It’s almost time for another episode of #TheBadBatchS3 Get ready!  #StarWars

One of my favorite Omega reactions we animated was the slight expression change and lift in her head when Crosshair calls her “Omega” as she is walking away from his cell.  First time he has called her by her real name on the show. #TheBadBatchS3 #StarWars

What an amazing event!  So great to see and HEAR all the fans reactions.  Thanks to all of you who were able to come out and show our team so much love.  Means the world to our whole crew!  #TheBadBatch #StarWars
It’s finally time…. So excited for you all to see what we have been up to, and where this story goes.  Hope you all enjoy!  #starwars #TheBadBatch

After watching #Ahsoka episode 5, I think this quote perfectly embodies my thoughts on the show @dave_filoni “when I left you I was but the learner, but now I am the master”.  Amazing job to everyone working on the show!  Can’t wait till next week.  #StarWars
All I can say is Wow, and Bravo @dave_filoni !  #Ahsoka
5 years already!  My how time flies.  Loved working on that show.  #StarWars #StarWarsRebels
And there you have it...  Can’t wait for you all to see where the story of the #TheBadBatchSeason3 takes us.  #StarWars #StarWarsCelebration2023 #TheBadBatch
That’s our leader right there.  #StarWars #StarWarsCelebration2023 #TheCloneWars

I hope that you all enjoyed this season of #TheBadBatch as much as we all enjoyed making it.  It was an honor to be a small part of another amazing run of animated Star Wars stories.  We keep trying to raise the bar and appreciate you all watching!  #StarWars
Just a little over 2 days left before our finale double episode.  So much could happen?  Any thoughts as to what could be in store for our crew of clones?  #StarWars #TheBadBatch

One of my favorite sequences we animated on the show.  I have two sons.  One I had just finished teaching how to drive, and the other is now just starting to drive.  Definitely a personal scene for me with some humor thrown in.  So much fun!    #TheBadBatch #starwars

What an amazing show to work on!  All new characters that became our crazy mashed up space family.  Thanks for watching if you have, and if you have not you are in for a real treat.  #StarWars #starwarsrebels

A slightly different episode tonight from last weeks.  We are going from minimal number of characters to an amazingly huge number of people.  Super proud of our crowd team for this one!  Also what a setting for an adventure.  #StarWars #theBadBatch

Hope you all enjoyed the return of Crosshair.  To get all of that amazing snow working in tandem with the animation on our schedule was an amazing accomplishment by our entire team.  Proud to be a part of it.  #Lucasfilm #StarWars #TheBadBatch

Prepare yourselves.  This weeks more contained episode allowed us to really focus on the subtle nuances of a few characters.  Add in some AMAZING fx work by @joelaron and team. Then you have a recipe for a killer episode of the #BadBatch #StarWars this week.  Enjoy!

One of my favorite episodes of the season!  Hope you all enjoy.  We had a good time making this one.  We were able to get a bit creepy and suspenseful, and had lots of fun doing it.  #starwars #TheBadBatch
Hope not one, but TWO episodes of the #TheBadBatch this week is enough to get you all through.  Enjoy!  Some pretty interesting events take place...  #starwars

Kashyyk was a big challenge for our whole team.  We spent months trying to figure out how to approach all the foliage and the massive size of the plant life.  Plus we wanted to interact with as well.  So proud of the collaboration on that one!  #BadBatch #StarWars

Hope you all enjoy “Faster” our take on some backwater planet pod racing.  Stew Lee and the story team did a great job choreographing the races.  Plus We got to animate some fun new characters.  #StarWars #TheBadBatch
So proud of what our crowd team was able to accomplish for this next episode.   Not something you usually see in an animated television series. This next one is a lot of fun!  #StarWars #TheBadBatch

Guess who's back....  He also brought some old Clone Wars friends with him.  I really love this episode.  Saul Ruiz and his story team did a great job with the choreography.  So much fun animating battle droids and droidekas again.  Check it out #BadBatch #StarWars

It is sooo…. close.  So excited for you all to finally start seeing Season 2 of #TheBadBatch  Thanks for all your continued support for our animation stories.  I hope you all enjoy the first two episodes this week!  #StarWars
It’s getting closer...  Just a little more than a week left.  Really excited for you all to see Season 2!  #TheBadBatch #StarWars
It’s almost time...  Just a little less than a month away!  Hope you all enjoyed the trailer that dropped today for Season 2 of #TheBadBatch

One of my favorite aspects of #TalesOfTheJedi was having the opportunity to go back to some earlier character models and rigs and update them to our current standards.  Fun to animate younger Anakin and Ashoka again! #StarWars
I think that some of you may enjoy these little Tales.  I know that we all had fun creating them.  I hope you check them out.  #TalesoftheJedi
Super excited for you all to see them both!  #theBadBatch #TalesOfTheJedi

FYI...  My amazing partner in crime in the animated #StarWars  galaxy is celebrating his 30th year at #Lucasfilm!  Without @joelaron LAL would not be what it is today.  He has overseen the look of every frame since Season 2 of #CloneWars! Congrats, it’s an honor to work with you.
Not too much longer...  Excited for you all to see what adventures the second season has in store for the #TheBadBatch #StarWars
Super fun to work on these with @dave_filoni.  Untold stories of some beloved characters. #starwars

I just wanted to say a huge THANK YOU to all the amazing Star Wars fans out there.  The love and appreciation you showed to our animation team throughout #StarWarsCelebration means so much to all of us.  We will do our best to continue to bring great stories to you all #StarWars
First look at our boys and gal in Season 2!  Plenty of fun this season for sure.  Hope you all enjoy it as much as we love making it!  #TheBadBatch #StarWars

Last one for the night.  Go check out The Siege of Mandalore tomorrow at #StarWarsCelebration Getting to see it on the big screen is how it was always meant to be viewed if you get the chance.  Super proud of all the work that went into those final 4 episodes.
Almost time for some surprises at the #BadBatch panel tomorrow at #StarWarsCelebration.  Enjoy!

I hope all of you who were able to attend #TalesOfTheJedi panel at #StarWarsCelebration enjoyed what you saw!  We really enjoyed making it with @dave_filoni at the helm.   That guy seems to know the #StarWars galaxy pretty well.

Just confirmed my hotel for #StarWarsCelebration. Come on up and say “Hi” if you see me walking the floor.  Always happy to talk Animation, Bad Batch, or whatever else.  Looking forward to seeing you all down there.  #starwars.
Nice spot!  There is always a plan and intent behind what we do at Lucasfilm Animation.  So proud to be a part of the team.  #starwars
2 years ago today!  Hard to believe.  #TheCloneWars #StarWars
No need to worry we are all working hard to tell some more great stories with this crazy crew!  #thebadbatch #StarWars

The fact that #RebelsRemembered is a thing is a just a testament to how great all the #StarWarsRebels fans are!  Thank you for watching our little family drama in a galaxy far far away...  all orchestrated by our leader @dave_filoni It was an honor to work on. https://t.co/5DCV9N101Y

Animating those Lothcats was so much fun!  My favorite was the smiling expression on the lothcat’s face right before the trooper shoots at him.  Then the contrast to an angry expression as the cat leaps at the troopers head.  I miss that show.  #StarWarsRebels
Possibly my favorite #StarWarsRebels episode we did.  Having the opportunity to really push the expressions and subtle character moments between the two was a highlight.

tweets.text: I can’t believe our finale for #TheBadBatch just aired, and now ALL 6 shorts for #TalesOfTheEmpire are going to air tomorrow!  It’s like a Lucasfilm Animation Christmas.  Happy #MayThe4th A lot of hard work and love for #StarWars went into them.  Enjoy!

All I can say is Wow!  Truly at a loss for words…. All the love that we are getting back from fans as our BB show comes to an end is amazing.  Thank you so much to each and everyone of you who watch and love the show.  #TheBadBatch #StarWars

Will these be needed after tomorrow?  Guess we will find out…. Hope you all enjoy the final episode of #TheBadBatch #StarWars Thanks so much from all of us for watching Clone Force 99’s journey! https://t.co/v20SAgclnw
Some of my personal favorite voiceover work of the entire show!  @NoshirDalal had us all laughing when we got to hear what we had to work with for animation.  So much fun!  #StarWars #TheBadBatch

That is awesome to hear!  Our amazing episodic director Steward Lee set us up for success with some outstanding fight choreography!  When it comes to hand to hand or any kind of martial arts he is our secret weapon. From that point the animation team puts on the finishing touches
Hope you all enjoy this episode as much we did while we were making it!  #thebadbatch #StarWars
This week is the first of the final 8 episodes of #TheBadBatch Hope everyone is ready for this ride that we have coming up!  #StarWars

That last Bad Batch was a fun episode.  We had not really done a swamp episode.  @joelaron and our FX team did amazing work in that one with the water.  The crazy Sylar Seris was a blast to animate!  Hope you all enjoyed!  #TheBadBatchS3 #StarWars

Hope you all enjoy the double dip of the #TheBadBatch this week.  Last weekend was one of my favorite animated scenes between Crosshair and Hunter in the snow.  Wonder what the crew is up to this week?  About time to find out!  #StarWars
So it’s true!  We are hiring for two mid level animator positions to join our incredible team at LAL.    Now is the time if you are interested!  #lucasfilm #StarWars
It’s almost time for another episode of #TheBadBatchS3 Get ready!  #StarWars

One of my favorite Omega reactions we animated was the slight expression change and lift in her head when Crosshair calls her “Omega” as she is walking away from his cell.  First time he has called her by her real name on the show. #TheBadBatchS3 #StarWars

What an amazing event!  So great to see and HEAR all the fans reactions.  Thanks to all of you who were able to come out and show our team so much love.  Means the world to our whole crew!  #TheBadBatch #StarWars
It’s finally time…. So excited for you all to see what we have been up to, and where this story goes.  Hope you all enjoy!  #starwars #TheBadBatch

After watching #Ahsoka episode 5, I think this quote perfectly embodies my thoughts on the show @dave_filoni “when I left you I was but the learner, but now I am the master”.  Amazing job to everyone working on the show!  Can’t wait till next week.  #StarWars
All I can say is Wow, and Bravo @dave_filoni !  #Ahsoka
5 years already!  My how time flies.  Loved working on that show.  #StarWars #StarWarsRebels
And there you have it...  Can’t wait for you all to see where the story of the #TheBadBatchSeason3 takes us.  #StarWars #StarWarsCelebration2023 #TheBadBatch
That’s our leader right there.  #StarWars #StarWarsCelebration2023 #TheCloneWars

I hope that you all enjoyed this season of #TheBadBatch as much as we all enjoyed making it.  It was an honor to be a small part of another amazing run of animated Star Wars stories.  We keep trying to raise the bar and appreciate you all watching!  #StarWars
Just a little over 2 days left before our finale double episode.  So much could happen?  Any thoughts as to what could be in store for our crew of clones?  #StarWars #TheBadBatch

One of my favorite sequences we animated on the show.  I have two sons.  One I had just finished teaching how to drive, and the other is now just starting to drive.  Definitely a personal scene for me with some humor thrown in.  So much fun!    #TheBadBatch #starwars

What an amazing show to work on!  All new characters that became our crazy mashed up space family.  Thanks for watching if you have, and if you have not you are in for a real treat.  #StarWars #starwarsrebels

A slightly different episode tonight from last weeks.  We are going from minimal number of characters to an amazingly huge number of people.  Super proud of our crowd team for this one!  Also what a setting for an adventure.  #StarWars #theBadBatch

Hope you all enjoyed the return of Crosshair.  To get all of that amazing snow working in tandem with the animation on our schedule was an amazing accomplishment by our entire team.  Proud to be a part of it.  #Lucasfilm #StarWars #TheBadBatch

Prepare yourselves.  This weeks more contained episode allowed us to really focus on the subtle nuances of a few characters.  Add in some AMAZING fx work by @joelaron and team. Then you have a recipe for a killer episode of the #BadBatch #StarWars this week.  Enjoy!

One of my favorite episodes of the season!  Hope you all enjoy.  We had a good time making this one.  We were able to get a bit creepy and suspenseful, and had lots of fun doing it.  #starwars #TheBadBatch
Hope not one, but TWO episodes of the #TheBadBatch this week is enough to get you all through.  Enjoy!  Some pretty interesting events take place...  #starwars

Kashyyk was a big challenge for our whole team.  We spent months trying to figure out how to approach all the foliage and the massive size of the plant life.  Plus we wanted to interact with as well.  So proud of the collaboration on that one!  #BadBatch #StarWars

Hope you all enjoy “Faster” our take on some backwater planet pod racing.  Stew Lee and the story team did a great job choreographing the races.  Plus We got to animate some fun new characters.  #StarWars #TheBadBatch
So proud of what our crowd team was able to accomplish for this next episode.   Not something you usually see in an animated television series. This next one is a lot of fun!  #StarWars #TheBadBatch

Guess who's back....  He also brought some old Clone Wars friends with him.  I really love this episode.  Saul Ruiz and his story team did a great job with the choreography.  So much fun animating battle droids and droidekas again.  Check it out #BadBatch #StarWars

It is sooo…. close.  So excited for you all to finally start seeing Season 2 of #TheBadBatch  Thanks for all your continued support for our animation stories.  I hope you all enjoy the first two episodes this week!  #StarWars
It’s getting closer...  Just a little more than a week left.  Really excited for you all to see Season 2!  #TheBadBatch #StarWars
It’s almost time...  Just a little less than a month away!  Hope you all enjoyed the trailer that dropped today for Season 2 of #TheBadBatch

One of my favorite aspects of #TalesOfTheJedi was having the opportunity to go back to some earlier character models and rigs and update them to our current standards.  Fun to animate younger Anakin and Ashoka again! #StarWars
I think that some of you may enjoy these little Tales.  I know that we all had fun creating them.  I hope you check them out.  #TalesoftheJedi
Super excited for you all to see them both!  #theBadBatch #TalesOfTheJedi

FYI...  My amazing partner in crime in the animated #StarWars  galaxy is celebrating his 30th year at #Lucasfilm!  Without @joelaron LAL would not be what it is today.  He has overseen the look of every frame since Season 2 of #CloneWars! Congrats, it’s an honor to work with you.
Not too much longer...  Excited for you all to see what adventures the second season has in store for the #TheBadBatch #StarWars
Super fun to work on these with @dave_filoni.  Untold stories of some beloved characters. #starwars

I just wanted to say a huge THANK YOU to all the amazing Star Wars fans out there.  The love and appreciation you showed to our animation team throughout #StarWarsCelebration means so much to all of us.  We will do our best to continue to bring great stories to you all #StarWars
First look at our boys and gal in Season 2!  Plenty of fun this season for sure.  Hope you all enjoy it as much as we love making it!  #TheBadBatch #StarWars

Last one for the night.  Go check out The Siege of Mandalore tomorrow at #StarWarsCelebration Getting to see it on the big screen is how it was always meant to be viewed if you get the chance.  Super proud of all the work that went into those final 4 episodes.
Almost time for some surprises at the #BadBatch panel tomorrow at #StarWarsCelebration.  Enjoy!

I hope all of you who were able to attend #TalesOfTheJedi panel at #StarWarsCelebration enjoyed what you saw!  We really enjoyed making it with @dave_filoni at the helm.   That guy seems to know the #StarWars galaxy pretty well.

Just confirmed my hotel for #StarWarsCelebration. Come on up and say “Hi” if you see me walking the floor.  Always happy to talk Animation, Bad Batch, or whatever else.  Looking forward to seeing you all down there.  #starwars.
Nice spot!  There is always a plan and intent behind what we do at Lucasfilm Animation.  So proud to be a part of the team.  #starwars
2 years ago today!  Hard to believe.  #TheCloneWars #StarWars
No need to worry we are all working hard to tell some more great stories with this crazy crew!  #thebadbatch #StarWars

The fact that #RebelsRemembered is a thing is a just a testament to how great all the #StarWarsRebels fans are!  Thank you for watching our little family drama in a galaxy far far away...  all orchestrated by our leader @dave_filoni It was an honor to work on. https://t.co/5DCV9N101Y

Animating those Lothcats was so much fun!  My favorite was the smiling expression on the lothcat’s face right before the trooper shoots at him.  Then the contrast to an angry expression as the cat leaps at the troopers head.  I miss that show.  #StarWarsRebels
Possibly my favorite #StarWarsRebels episode we did.  Having the opportunity to really push the expressions and subtle character moments between the two was a highlight.
Glad you are liking them!  Can’t wait for you all to see what we have in store for this group in Season 2.  #StarWars

This, aside from the finale was my personal favorite #BadBatch episode of Season 1.  Animating the Cad Bane and Fennic fight driven by the choreography from our amazing story team was so much fun.  Plus the environment fog throughout to put it over the top.
Getting the chance to supervise her animation on #TheCloneWars was truly an honor.  Thank you to George Lucas and Dave Filoni for such an amazing character. @dave_filoni

They were all fun in their own way with their own unique challenges.  Maul vs. Pre Vizsla holds a special place as it was part saber part Mandalorian.  Then Maul vs. Ashoka, just so much fun and nuance in that one, with the height adding a dimension.  #starwars

Hope you all enjoy #StarWarsVisions Some really unique takes on that galaxy far,far, away that George Lucas let's us play in.  Really striking visuals, edits, and stories created by these studios with no limitations on imagination.

It's almost here.  The finale of the 1st season of #TheBadBatch I hope you all enjoy it!  I wanted to thank our entire cast and crew for putting their heart and soul into this show.  It takes a lot, especially this past year to produce this show.
Guess we can finally say it officially!  So excited to bring you all some more stories and epic episodes with this cast and crew.  Thanks for watching! #TheBadBatch

So....  What does everyone think?  Anyone have any ideas on how this plays out with the #BadBatch as we barrel toward the the finale?  Will there be sadness, joy or something else?  All I know is I can’t wait for you all to see what our amazing crew has created.  Enjoy!
Going to be a good one tonight!  Hope you all enjoy.  You never know what you might see.  #TheBadBatch
So good to hear that everybody is enjoying our Ryloth adventure!  #TheBadBatch so fun to get to animate to @vanmarshall beautiful voice work.  Also a lot of love for Howzer out there, is it the hair?

Sooo...  Good surprise?  Always nice to see some old friends.  #StarWarsRebels #CloneWars my favorite scenes were when the two kids were talking in the cockpit of the Marauder.  Such great dialogue @JenniferCorbett Fun to animate!  #TheBadBatch
Really proud of the crowd work we did in Episode 10 of #TheBadBatch some of our biggest and most complex.  Also love the subtle animation on Omega and Cid in their scenes together in this one.
That was some of my favorite Anakin animation we did in Season 7 of #CloneWars my favorite shot is the closeup where his eyes are scanning for his target while he is stalling for time.
Hope you are all excited for the new #badbatch this week!  Look forward to hearing the reactions.
This one was so much fun!  We really tried to push the physicality of the fight scenes for the combatants.  Hope you all enjoy Episode 9.  It’s a fun ride with some real emotion.  #TheBadBatch
See...  I did not lie.  Keep watching.  We have some great stories for you all as we rocket into the back half of the season!  #TheBadBatch
If you think you know what happens in this weeks #TheBadBatch You don’t...  Enjoy!

Time to watch #TheBadBatch This week kicks off a truly great second half of the season!  You are all in for a ride.  The water FX this week by @joelaron @galiotti and team are stunning.  So much fun to work on this show with THIS team!  #lucasfilm

A little background on the talented writer Amanda Munoz.  We hired her to be my animation coordinator during #StarWarsRebels.  She was awesome, but always enjoyed writing.  Went on to script coordinator, then supervisor and now a writer!  What a story!  So proud. #TheBadBatch

Our latest episode of #TheBadBatch was definitely one of the most technically complex episodes we have ever done.  That droid factory took a lot of coordination from design all the way through lighting.  So proud of the entire team for this one!

So much fun getting a chance to animate a big monster fight in this one!  Plus a really fun new character. I am looking at you miss female Trandoshan!  Definitely a fun ride on this one.  Happy to hear the detail put into Echo's helmet wearing is being recognized.  #TheBadBatch

Hope everyone is enjoying #TheBadBatch so far.  It was fun getting a chance to animate a younger Fennec Shand voiced by the incomparable @MingNa Hope you also caught Clink translated from our #starwarsresistance style to this one.  Love that droid!

I have to give a huge shoutout to @deebradleybaker Our shows would not be what they are without his amazing talent.  I get the privilege to see him in action.  What he can do is astounding.  Thanks for giving all our clones a unique voice.  #StarWars #StarWarsTheBadBatch

Finally I see one of these with our outstanding Director of Cinimatography @joelaron and our director Nate Villanueva.  This episode was definitely one of the highlights of my career.  What a frame!  #StarWars #CloneWars
Hope you all enjoy the second episode in Clone Force 99’s travels.  Some really fun Omega discovering new things moments in this one.  #StarWarsTheBadBatch #StarWars
Here is another glimpse at the #TheBadBatch.  Hope you all enjoy!  #starwars #DisneyPlus.   So proud of our entire cast and crew!

Sad news regarding David Prowse.  I remember when I was animating Darth Vader for the first time in the #StarWarsRebels prologue scene we did.  I was studying all his little physical performance choices to make sure they came across in our animated version.

After 10 plus years having the privilege animating Ashoka Tano #CloneWars #StarWarsRebels it was so great to see her brought into the live-action world in #TheMandalorian that first reveal in the fog with those white sabers was epic. Thanks @dave_filoni
So excited that we officially announced our next project!  Can’t wait for you all to see what we have been up to. #BadBatch Continue the #StarWars journey with us on #DisneyPlus

Well...  here we go.  It’s all come down to this.  Hope the ending is all you want it to be.  I know we at Lucasfilm Animation along with our overseas partners CGCG gave our all to create it for you.  The #CloneWars are finished.  Happy May the 4th be you!  #SiegeofMandalore

Here comes chapter 3 with chapter 4 not far behind.  Can’t believe the #CloneWars is almost at an end.  Thanks so much for watching for all those years, and fighting to bring us back for one final season!  #SiegeofMandalore
One more day till chapter 2.  An epic showdown is coming.  Hope you all tune in.  #SiegeofMandalore #CloneWars

For me a 10+ year journey is coming to an end as the final four episodes of Clone Wars begin airing on #DisneyPlus. I hope we we were able to create stories and images in a galaxy far far way that you will always remember . #clonewars.  Thanks for watching. #SiegeofMandalore
@SamWitwer I have seen all 4.  3/4 is not that big of a deal, Mr. Witwer.  😛What an incredible voice performance you gave us to work with. #SiegeOfMandalore #CloneWars

This week marks the takeoff to the epic Battle of Mandalore!  I hope you have all enjoyed the first 8 episodes of #CloneWars in these uncertain times hopefully these stories are bringing you some joy.
At midnight tonight Ahsoka makes her triumphant return to #CloneWars !  Hope you all enjoy this first one and have fun meeting Trace and Rafa Martez.  The countdown to Mandalore has begun!
Hope you all enjoyed the first arc of the season with the Bad Batch!  I know we had a lot of fun with those characters.  Now onto something different!  Enjoy #CloneWars
Just wondering if anyone caught the #starwarsrebels Easter egg in the 1st episode of #CloneWars ?  Hmmm...  I am sure some good of you must have.

So amazing to hear all the fan reactions to the new trailer.  Our entire crew worked incredibly hard for the last few years to bring these stories to you.  So proud of them and excited for all of you.  #CloneWarsSaved
Can’t wait for you all to see what we have come up with for the season.  Some amazing stories for you all to watch and enjoy. #Clonewarssaved
